Notes: Wesleyan pulled out the non-league victory over RPI with a big OT period.
The Cardinals sent the game into OT with a missed free throw and put back by
freshman Hannah Stubbs with six seconds remaining.  RPI was led by Kaitlyn
Saunders double-double, while Shaleen Bowman paced Wesleyan with 24 points.
